top_signals.title: Italy rethinks EU defense-financing aid as arms spending falls out of fashion
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni wants to refocus the bloc's help on lowering the cost of living for Italians, as energy costs have soared amid the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran’s Ambassador to France Discusses Hormuz and Gulf Relations
top_signals.summary: Iranian Ambassador Mohammad Amin-Nejad sat down in Paris with Bloomberg News for an hour-long interview at his official residence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Boerse Stuttgart adds Societe Generale, SG-FORGE, and flatexDEGIRO to ‘pan-European’ tokenized settlement network
top_signals.summary: Nasdaq’s European trading venues will connect to Seturion to facilitate trading and settlement of tokenized securities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
